sql: SELECT u.URUN_ADI, SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS TOPLAM_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM r ON f.REF_ID = r.REF_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_URUN u ON r.URUN_ID = u.URUN_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYYMM') = '202512' GROUP BY u.URUN_ADI ORDER BY TOPLAM_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses VOP_TL metric with required date filter on ek tanzim tarihi and joins to product dimension
risk_notes: Relies on POL_URUN join path which may require additional validation
description:
Question answered: Lists top 10 products by total VOP for December 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM, POL_URUN.
Filters: Applies date filter on ek tanzim tarihi for December 2025.
Grouping/measures: Groups by product name and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: URUN_ADI, TOPLAM_VOP.
Assumptions: Assumes POL_URUN join path is valid and contains accurate product names.

sql: SELECT u.URUN_ADI, SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS TOPLAM_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AGGR.AS400_YENI_URUN u ON f.URUN_ID = u.URUN_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYYMM') = '202512' GROUP BY u.URUN_ADI ORDER BY TOPLAM_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Alternative product join path using AS400_YENI_URUN dimension
risk_notes: Uses AGGR schema table which may require additional validation
description:
Question answered: Lists top 10 products by total VOP for December 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, AGGR.AS400_YENI_URUN.
Filters: Applies date filter on ek tanzim tarihi for December 2025.
Grouping/measures: Groups by product name and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: URUN_ADI, TOPLAM_VOP.
Assumptions: Uses AGGR.AS400_YENI_URUN as the product dimension, which is explicitly listed in join_needs and is likely the correct source for URUN_ADI.

sql: SELECT r.URUN_ADI, SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS TOPLAM_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM r ON f.REF_ID = r.REF_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYYMM') = '202512' GROUP BY r.URUN_ADI ORDER BY TOPLAM_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
risk_notes: May miss some product details compared to full join path
description:
Question answered: Lists top 10 products by total VOP for December 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM.
Filters: Applies date filter on ek tanzim tarihi for December 2025.
Grouping/measures: Groups by product name and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: URUN_ADI, TOPLAM_VOP.
Assumptions: Assumes POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM contains accurate product names, but may miss product details compared to using POL_URUN.
